description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a manicured lawn, trees, and hedges. The structure features large windows and sliding glass doors, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. A spacious backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, bordered by privacy hedges and greenery. The house layout is open, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as private rooms and bathrooms. The property is enclosed by a perimeter fence and has a driveway leading to a garage. The landscaping is minimalistic, with geometric lines and a focus on greenery for privacy and aesthetics.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a backyard pool, surrounded by manicured lawns and privacy hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a clear view of the open-plan living spaces with surrounding greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard swimming pool, large windows, and the lush privacy hedges enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open backyard, patio area, and the back facade of the house with visible outdoor seating.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the pool area, garage, and the extensive lawn with trees and hedges along the perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, no porch, and is accentuated by clean lines and minimalistic landscaping.
